response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing or navigation pipelines, and his professional C++ work is limited to academic/legacy contexts; his open-source GIS work is promising but not aligned with production-scale routing tiling or real-time traffic integration.
strengths: Demonstrated geospatial experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages
Strong track record in building scalable, distributed systems (e.g., high-throughput data pipelines)
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or geospatial tiling systems
Limited evidence of distributed systems expertise in fault tolerance or consistency for global routing data
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not the low-latency, systems-level C++ required

key_factors.factor: Lack of C++/Rust in Routing Context
